anomaly_detection.method: Pattern scanning on audit Run 114 data (backtest, n=965)

anomalies.description: Bot offline for 69.08 days — Day 69. No revenue generation. All edges remain unmonetized.
anomalies.action_required: Restart bot in paper mode: cd bot && python run.py paper

anomalies.description: SOL SHORT (WR=63.7%, EV=+$32.44/trade, n=179) blocked for 4th consecutive audit.
anomalies.action_required: CODE: Add exclude_symbols=['SOL'] to short_direction_veto_v1 in bot/llm/graduated_rules.py:matches()

anomalies.description: Payoff ratio = 0.686x. Avg loss $224.63 > avg win $153.99. Requires 59.4% WR to break even. System at 57% = net negative EV.
Max consecutive losses in backtest = 8. Last 4 trades before shutdown were SL hits.
anomalies.action_required: Ensure RESTART_SOFT_START_4LOSS rule fires on next restart (0.5x sizing first 10 trades).

anomalies.description: 100% of trades have duration_h=0.0 or -0.1. HoldTimeRuleManager cannot learn. 4th consecutive run flagging this.
anomalies.action_required: CODE: Fix hold_time_s in position_manager.py and backtest/engine.py

anomalies.description: 3 feedback state files missing: regime_feedback_state.json, signal_quality.json, confidence_state.json.
anomalies.action_required: None — auto-creates on first trade close.

anomalies.description: NEW: 2-3x R:R bucket = 34% WR, -$14,574 on 212 trades. This is a structural loss zone. >3x R:R bucket = 64.8% WR, +$17,277.
record_outcome() passes side='LONG'/'SHORT' but rules use side='BUY'/'SELL'. times_correct stays 0 for ALL side-conditioned rules.
anomalies.action_required: CODE: In multi_strategy_main.py line 3257, map LONG→SELL, SHORT→BUY before passing to record_outcome()

priority_actions.action: CODE FIX: Add exclude_symbols=['SOL'] to short_direction_veto_v1
CODE FIX: Fix duration_h in position_manager.py and backtest/engine.py
CONFIG: Review TP1_MULTIPLIER in trading_config.py (1.07 → 1.15 to push 2-3x R:R into >3x)
CODE FIX: Map LONG/SHORT → BUY/SELL in record_outcome() call (multi_strategy_main.py:3257)
